overgrow.desc: Powers up Grass-type moves in a pinch.

blaze.desc: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

solar-power.desc: Boosts Sp. Atk, but lowers HP in sunshine.

torrent.desc: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

swarm.desc: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

sniper.desc: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.

tangled-feet.desc: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.

big-pecks.desc: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.

unnerve.desc: Makes the foe nervous and unable to eat Berries.

sand-rush.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in a sandstorm.

rivalry.desc: Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.

sheer-force.desc: Removes added effects to increase move damage.

magic-guard.desc: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.

unaware.desc: Ignores any change in ability by the foe.

flash-fire.desc: Powers up if hit by fire.

competitive.desc: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

frisk.desc: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.

infiltrator.desc: Passes through the foe’s barrier and strikes.

dry-skin.desc: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.

wonder-skin.desc: Makes status-changing moves more likely to miss.

sand-force.desc: Boosts certain moves’ power in a sandstorm.

technician.desc: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.

anger-point.desc: Raises Attack upon taking a critical hit.

defiant.desc: When its stats are lowered its Attack increases.

justified.desc: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.

water-absorb.desc: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.

no-guard.desc: Ensures the Pokémon and its foe’s attacks land.

steadfast.desc: Raises Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.

gluttony.desc: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.

rock-head.desc: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.

regenerator.desc: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.

analytic.desc: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves last.

hydration.desc: Heals status problems if it is raining.

ice-body.desc: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.

poison-touch.desc: May poison targets when a Pokémon makes contact.

skill-link.desc: Increases the frequency of multi-strike moves.

overcoat.desc: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather.

levitate.desc: Gives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

cursed-body.desc: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.

weak-armor.desc: Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.

forewarn.desc: Determines what moves the foe has.

aftermath.desc: Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.

harvest.desc: May create another Berry after one is used.

reckless.desc: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

unburden.desc: Raises Speed if a held item is used.

iron-fist.desc: Boosts the power of punching moves.

neutralizing-gas.desc: If the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas is in the battle, the effects of all Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

healer.desc: May heal an ally’s status conditions.

leaf-guard.desc: Prevents status problems in sunny weather.

scrappy.desc: Enables moves to hit Ghost-type foes.

mold-breaker.desc: Moves can be used regardless of abilities.

moxie.desc: Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokémon.

rattled.desc: Some move types scare it and boost its Speed.

imposter.desc: It transforms itself into the Pokémon it is facing.

adaptability.desc: Powers up moves of the same type.

quick-feet.desc: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.

download.desc: Adjusts power according to the foe’s ability.

multiscale.desc: Reduces damage when HP is full.

super-luck.desc: Heightens the critical-hit ratios of moves.

sap-sipper.desc: Boosts Attack when hit by a Grass-type move.

prankster.desc: Gives priority to a status move.

telepathy.desc: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

contrary.desc: Makes stat changes have an opposite effect.

pickpocket.desc: Steals an item when hit by another Pokémon.

honey-gather.desc: The Pokémon may gather Honey from somewhere.

moody.desc: Raises one stat and lowers another.

wind-rider.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.

poison-heal.desc: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.

normalize.desc: All the Pokémon’s moves become the Normal type.

stall.desc: The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.

simple.desc: The Pokémon is prone to wild stat changes.

toxic-boost.desc: Powers up physical attacks when poisoned.

storm-drain.desc: The Pokémon draws in all Water-type moves.

protean.desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s using.

flower-gift.desc: Powers up party Pokémon when it is sunny.

flare-boost.desc: Powers up special attacks when burned.

klutz.desc: The Pokémon can’t use any held items.

heatproof.desc: Weakens the power of Fire-type moves.

snow-warning.desc: The Pokémon summons a hailstorm in battle.

motor-drive.desc: Raises Speed if hit by an Electric-type move.

multitype.desc: Changes type to match the held Plate.

victory-star.desc: Boosts the accuracy of its allies and itself.

zen-mode.desc: Changes the Pokémon’s shape when HP is halved.

mummy.desc: Contact with this Pokémon spreads this Ability.

defeatist.desc: Lowers stats when HP becomes half or less.

illusion.desc: Comes out disguised as the Pokémon in back.

iron-barbs.desc: Inflicts damage to the Pokémon on contact.

slush-rush.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.

turboblaze.desc: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.

teravolt.desc: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.

bulletproof.desc: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.

magician.desc: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.

cheek-pouch.desc: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.

flower-veil.desc: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.

symbiosis.desc: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.

grass-pelt.desc: Boosts the Defense stat in Grassy Terrain.

stance-change.desc: The Pokémon changes form depending on how it battles.

aroma-veil.desc: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.

sweet-veil.desc: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.

tough-claws.desc: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

mega-launcher.desc: Powers up aura and pulse moves.

strong-jaw.desc: The Pokémon’s strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.

gooey.desc: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.

fairy-aura.desc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

dark-aura.desc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.

aura-break.desc: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed.

long-reach.desc: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

liquid-voice.desc: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

stakeout.desc: Doubles the damage dealt to the target’s replacement if the target switches out.

battery.desc: Powers up ally Pokémon’s special moves.

dancer.desc: When another Pokémon uses a dance move, it can use a dance move following it regardless of its Speed.

schooling.desc: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokémon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.

merciless.desc: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

stamina.desc: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.

water-bubble.desc: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.

corrosion.desc: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it’s a Steel or Poison type.

fluffy.desc: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

queenly-majesty.desc: Its majesty pressures the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

triage.desc: Gives priority to a healing move.

receiver.desc: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

wimp-out.desc: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

emergency-exit.desc: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

water-compaction.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat sharply when hit by a Water-type move.

innards-out.desc: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.

rks-system.desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the memory disc it holds.

shields-down.desc: When its HP becomes half or less, the Pokémon’s shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

comatose.desc: It’s always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack without waking up.

disguise.desc: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.

dazzling.desc: Surprises the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

berserk.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when it takes a  hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

electric-surge.desc: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

psychic-surge.desc: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

grassy-surge.desc: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

misty-surge.desc: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

full-metal-body.desc: Prevents other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon’s stats.

shadow-shield.desc: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

beast-boost.desc: The Pokémon boosts its most proficient stat each time it knocks out a Pokémon.

prism-armor.desc: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks taken.

soul-heart.desc: Boosts its Sp. Atk stat every time a Pokémon faints.

libero.desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use.

mirror-armor.desc: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

cotton-down.desc: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stat of all Pokémon except itself.

ball-fetch.desc: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

steam-engine.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat drastically if hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

ripen.desc: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

sand-spit.desc: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

gulp-missile.desc: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

propeller-tail.desc: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

punk-rock.desc: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

steely-spirit.desc: Powers up ally Pokémon’s Steel-type moves.

perish-body.desc: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

screen-cleaner.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

wandering-spirit.desc: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

ice-scales.desc: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

power-spot.desc: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.

ice-face.desc: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it hails.

hunger-switch.desc: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.

stalwart.desc: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

intrepid-sword.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

dauntless-shield.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

unseen-fist.desc: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

chilling-neigh.desc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

grim-neigh.desc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

lingering-aroma.desc: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

well-baked-body.desc: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

seed-sower.desc: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

purifying-salt.desc: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

electromorphosis.desc: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

wind-power.desc: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

guard-dog.desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

mycelium-might.desc: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

anger-shell.desc: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

opportunist.desc: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

zero-to-hero.desc: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

earth-eater.desc: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

toxic-debris.desc: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

costar.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it copies an ally's stat changes.

commander.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokémon then issues commands from there.

cud-chew.desc: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

armor-tail.desc: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

supreme-overlord.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

protosynthesis.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

quark-drive.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

thermal-exchange.desc: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

good-as-gold.desc: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.

tablets-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.

sword-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.

vessel-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.

beads-of-ruin.desc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.

orichalcum-pulse.desc: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

hadron-engine.desc: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

supersweet-syrup.desc: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

hospitality.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

toxic-chain.desc: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

tera-shift.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

poison-puppeteer.desc: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
